gauge.name: St. Louis Creek (CO) above Fraser

impacts.statement: There is extensive flooding of structures and roads along St. Louis Creek.
Buildings and roads along St. Louis Creek in and near Fraser flood.
St. Louis Creek begins to impact streets in Fraser.
St. Louis Creek begins overflowing into low lying areas in Fraser.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice during winter months.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
